feed.title: whimsysoul
feed.subtitle: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from whimsysoul

entry.title: Please please please wear a jacket or something 🤧 dont freeze your b00ty off #outsidelands #sanfrancisco #festival #outsidelands2024 #goldengatepark
entry.content: Please please please wear a jacket or something 🤧 dont freeze your b00ty off #outsidelands #sanfrancisco #festival #outsidelands2024 #goldengatepark

entry.title: this cafe has the BEST view in California ✨ And low-key the best sandwiches in the county. I just adore Cafe Aquatica and always stop here when I'm passing through Hwy 1 on the Sonoma Coast!! #jennercalifornia #visitsonoma #coffeeshop #whimsysoul #califo
entry.content: this cafe has the BEST view in California ✨ And low-key the best sandwiches in the county. I just adore Cafe Aquatica and always stop here when I'm passing through Hwy 1 on the Sonoma Coast!! #jennercalifornia #visitsonoma #coffeeshop #whimsysoul #califo

entry.title: New gift card just dropped in San Francisco!!! $50 to Radhaus, a rad german restaurant & tap room in Fort Mason. If you find this LET ME KNOW so i can update everyone playing. Good luck! #sanfrancisco #sanfranciscolife #fortmason #bayareacheck #bayareafoo
entry.content: New gift card just dropped in San Francisco!!! $50 to Radhaus, a rad german restaurant & tap room in Fort Mason. If you find this LET ME KNOW so i can update everyone playing. Good luck! #sanfrancisco #sanfranciscolife #fortmason #bayareacheck #bayareafoo

entry.title: Replying to @Bridget OSL day 1 fit check. My 🍒 were only cold at the very end, this duster was pretty solid. What should i wear tomorrow for Sabrina?? #sanfrancisco #bayareacheck #outsidelands #outsidelands2024 #outsidelandsoutfits #whimsysoul #osl2024 #s
entry.content: Replying to @Bridget OSL day 1 fit check. My 🍒 were only cold at the very end, this duster was pretty solid. What should i wear tomorrow for Sabrina?? #sanfrancisco #bayareacheck #outsidelands #outsidelands2024 #outsidelandsoutfits #whimsysoul #osl2024 #s

entry.title: Replying to @mariah got barricade & free lobster rolls so this was a successful day 1 at outside lands!! Can't wait for sabrina tonight ❤️ #sanfrancisco #outsidelands #outsidelands2024 #bayareacheck #outsidelandsoutfits #whimsysoul #osl2024 #sanfranciscol
entry.content: Replying to @mariah got barricade & free lobster rolls so this was a successful day 1 at outside lands!! Can't wait for sabrina tonight ❤️ #sanfrancisco #outsidelands #outsidelands2024 #bayareacheck #outsidelandsoutfits #whimsysoul #osl2024 #sanfranciscol

entry.title: Replying to @❔the sun came out for Outside Lands day 2 😱 heard a new a new Sabrina Carpenter song, danced a lot, ate good food. It was a fantastic day. See ya there today for Chappel Roan!! #sanfrancisco #outsidelands #outsidelands2024 #bayareacheck #outs
entry.content: Replying to @❔the sun came out for Outside Lands day 2 😱 heard a new a new Sabrina Carpenter song, danced a lot, ate good food. It was a fantastic day. See ya there today for Chappel Roan!! #sanfrancisco #outsidelands #outsidelands2024 #bayareacheck #outs

entry.title: Replying to @Jessica Fierro | Music stuff you are all so fabulous and kind and why i love this city so much!! We have the best community!!! #sanfrancisco #outsidelands #outsidelands2024 #bayareacheck #outsidelandsoutfits #whimsysoul #onlyinsf
entry.content: Replying to @Jessica Fierro | Music stuff you are all so fabulous and kind and why i love this city so much!! We have the best community!!! #sanfrancisco #outsidelands #outsidelands2024 #bayareacheck #outsidelandsoutfits #whimsysoul #onlyinsf

entry.title: Replying to @Kurralynn Chappell Roan was FIRE! Day 3 outsidelands recap!! I'm still in bed recovering from an amazing weekend, chappell was the highlight of all the shows. Not sure OSL can ever top that experience ❤️ cheers to all the pink ponies!! #sanf
entry.content: Replying to @Kurralynn Chappell Roan was FIRE! Day 3 outsidelands recap!! I'm still in bed recovering from an amazing weekend, chappell was the highlight of all the shows. Not sure OSL can ever top that experience ❤️ cheers to all the pink ponies!! #sanf

entry.title: Replying to @Cass 🦇 had so much fun with my outside lands outfits this year!! Linked them all in my LTK profile link in bio!! #outsidelands #outsidelands2024 #outsidelandsoutfits #bayareacheck #sanfrancisco #onlyinsf #musicfestival #osl2024

entry.title: hidden in plain sight! This SF speakeasy looks like a bus stop from the outside, but is actually an upscale speakeasy serving up one of the best martinis in San Francisco. I'm a martini girl, and loved their Dirty featuring Hog Island sea brine and Monte
entry.content: hidden in plain sight! This SF speakeasy looks like a bus stop from the outside, but is actually an upscale speakeasy serving up one of the best martinis in San Francisco. I'm a martini girl, and loved their Dirty featuring Hog Island sea brine and Monte

entry.title: #duet with @Hot Gay Nerd still so wild to me that I actually made a vacation rental for fellow Californians to enoy and cool people come!? And have dance parties there? And enjoy the county recreation!? A dream!!! Thank you Santiago!! 💚💚💚 Learn more abou

entry.title: calling all fall lovers - this is your PERFECT fall day out in Sonoma County ❤️🍁🍎 🍎 Ratzlaff Ranch apple picking to stock up on tons of apples for fall baking!! 🥧Mom's Apple Pie for 16 different types of freshly baked pies 🥂 Iron Horse Vineyards has amaz

entry.title: the MOST insane Airbnb in California!! 😱If you love cool decor, cedar hot tubs, and amenities like a record player and espresso machine, all within proximity to Big Trees State Park, wineries, lakes and a ski hill - you NEED to book Whimsy Homes (yes, i a

entry.title: just spent a week in Arnold to do an owners checkin on my Airbnb up there but also to see friends, have meetings and enjoy the mountains during the end of summer at @Whimsy Homes Cabin Have you ever been to Calaveras County?? #vlog #travelvlog #calaveras
entry.content: just spent a week in Arnold to do an owners checkin on my Airbnb up there but also to see friends, have meetings and enjoy the mountains during the end of summer at @Whimsy Homes Cabin Have you ever been to Calaveras County?? #vlog #travelvlog #calaveras

entry.title: Instead of New England for autumn ⬇️ New England is the zaddy of fall colors and I'm so excited to visit this October for the first time, but there’s so many more amazing places in the USA to visit for fall foliage! And ones that are a lot easier + chea
entry.content: Instead of New England for autumn ⬇️ New England is the zaddy of fall colors and I'm so excited to visit this October for the first time, but there’s so many more amazing places in the USA to visit for fall foliage! And ones that are a lot easier + chea

entry.title: Put this SF wine bar on your foodie bucket list!! Take the N out to the Outer Sunset next time it's sunny, grab a table outside and bask in the sunshine with a glass of wine at palm city wines 🍷✨ you might just see me there - it's one of our fave places f
entry.content: Put this SF wine bar on your foodie bucket list!! Take the N out to the Outer Sunset next time it's sunny, grab a table outside and bask in the sunshine with a glass of wine at palm city wines 🍷✨ you might just see me there - it's one of our fave places f

entry.title: this CA hotel as the BEST fall colors!! I went to Desolation Hotel a few Octobers ago and still can't shut up about this magical place. @Justina Vanessa and I stayed in one of their glamping yurts that are decked out with luxury amenities like a soaking

entry.title: Fly to Louisville with me!! Basically on a hometown date with my bestie, she grew up here and we’re staying with her sister for the week. A lot of restaurants, pool time and doggy snuggles planned but drop recs if you have them!! NGL I was gagged by the h

entry.title: Ditch the sad beige, find your magic! ⭐️ Join me for hidden gems around California & the world, colorful outfits, definitely too much wine and tons of whimsy from your neighborhood ginger. (P.S. there’s a cabin…) @Whimsy Homes Cabin Oh, and more bingo. I

entry.title: Replying to @seanlawn breaking news! Second square is off the world cruise bingo card! Shoutout to @joe for alerting us today. What square do we think will be next? #ultimateworldcruise #worldcruise #bingo #worldcruisebingo #whimysoul #royalcaribbean #cr
